channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: COOLER INFLATION IS EASING PRESSURE FOR A FED RATE HIKE. BUT CHAIRMAN KEVIN WARSH HAS SAID LITTLE ABOUT HIS READING OF THE ECONOMY, LEAVING NEXT WEEK’S DECISION HARDER TO PREDICT. VIA ...

item.title: R to @SciTechera: Check From Here: https://chatgpt.com/share/6a60b2eb-0b64-83ee-9c76-7931ca1de063 X announcement source:

This graph theory problem was open for ~30 years.br /br /

item.title: Another 30-year-old conjecture may have fallen, this time in graph theory. 🤯 Imagine what AI will discover 10 years from now if it's already helping with problems like this today. we're only at the be
item.description: pAnother 30-year-old conjecture may have fallen, this time in graph theory. 🤯br /br /Imagine what AI will discover 10 years from now if it's already helping with problems like this today.br /br /we're only at the beginning of AI's journey in mathematics.br /br /Now, GPT-5.6 Pro has just reportedly p

item.title: EU Agrees New Russia Sanctions, Expands Restrictions on Crypto Platforms According to Reuters, EU member state envoys have agreed on the 21st sanctions package against Russia. The measures place 94 Ru
item.description: pEU Agrees New Russia Sanctions, Expands Restrictions on Crypto Platformsbr /br /According to Reuters, EU member state envoys have agreed on the 21st sanctions package against Russia. The measures place 94 Russian financial institutions and the Moscow Exchange under full sanctions, expand transactio

item.title: R to @WuBlockchain: BMEX, the exchange token issued by BitMEX, fell 96.55% over the past 24 hours to $0.002039, reducing its FDV to just $917,800.
item.description: pBMEX, the exchange token issued by BitMEX, fell 96.55% over the past 24 hours to $0.002039, reducing its FDV to just $917,800./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHN52q5AaoAA4yDB.png" /

item.title: Binance Sees Bitcoin Outflows Continue Despite Rising Deposit Activity “This divergence may indicate that investors are becoming more confident in Bitcoin's long-term outlook.” – By @xwinfinance

item.title: BitMEX recorded $84M in BTC futures volume yesterday, representing 0.08% of the market. It was a great exchange that helped shape the industry, and now it is passing the torch to the next generation o
item.description: pBitMEX recorded $84M in BTC futures volume yesterday, representing 0.08% of the market.br /br /It was a great exchange that helped shape the industry, and now it is passing the torch to the next generation of exchanges it inspired./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHN5s5MIbwAAh6I9.jpg" /hr /

item.title: RT by @nono2357: La France est le "principal épicentre" des attaques contre les détenteurs de cryptomonnaies: 33 sur les 52 incidents recensés dans le monde en 2026 étaient en France https://l.bfmtv.c

item.title: RT by @nono2357: 🚨 BitMEX, l'une des premières plateformes de dérivés crypto, va fermer définitivement le 23 septembre. ➡️ Fondée en 2014 par Arthur Hayes, la plateforme avait popularisé les contrats
item.description: p🚨 BitMEX, l'une des premières plateformes de dérivés crypto, va fermer définitivement le 23 septembre.br /br /➡️ Fondée en 2014 par Arthur Hayes, la plateforme avait popularisé les contrats perpétuels./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHN5ep1GXYAAxheK.jpg" /

item.title: Breaking: Arthur Hayes-Founded BitMEX, Pioneer of Crypto Perpetuals, to Shut Down BitMEX said it will permanently close its exchange at 04:00 UTC on September 23 and has stopped accepting new user reg
item.description: pBreaking: Arthur Hayes-Founded BitMEX, Pioneer of Crypto Perpetuals, to Shut Downbr /br /BitMEX said it will permanently close its exchange at 04:00 UTC on September 23 and has stopped accepting new user registrations. Co-founded by Arthur Hayes in 2014, BitMEX introduced the crypto industry’s firs
